testimonials.title: What our visitors say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover reviews from those who have already experienced Cosmos Angre.

1.name: Aminata K.
1.text: A shopping center on another level in Abidjan. The architecture is stunning and the stores are of international quality. Love it!

2.name: Jean-Pierre M.
2.text: Impressed by the diversity of stores and the quality of services. The parking is spacious and well organized. A premium experience.

3.name: Fatou D.
3.text: La Halle Gourmande is incredible, with options for every taste. The kids love the play area. We come back every weekend.

4.name: Kouame A.
4.text: Finally a shopping center worthy of the name in Ivory Coast. The EDGE certification is a real plus for the environment. Bravo!

5.name: Marie-Claire B.
5.text: The Cosmos Club is truly worth it. Member offers are generous and the VIP lounge is a real haven between shopping sessions.

storeDetail.ctaSubtitle: Join {{storeName}} and other stores at Cosmos Angre.

nike.description: Official Nike store offering shoes, clothing and sports accessories. Complete collection for men, women and children with the latest technological innovations.

zara.description: Trendy fashion for women and men. New collections every week inspired by the latest international trends.

techParadise.description: Smartphones, computers, high-tech accessories and appliances. After-sales service and warranty included.

hero.title: Dining
hero.subtitle: Restaurants, cafes and world cuisines. Something to enjoy any time of day, with family or friends.

leCosmos.desc: Contemporary African cuisine in a refined setting.

laBrasserie.desc: Parisian brasserie revisited with local products.

sakura.desc: Authentic Japanese sushi, ramen and specialties.

foodCourt.title: La Halle Gourmande

hero.title: Leisure & Culture
hero.subtitle: Cinema, entertainment, art gallery and more — experiences for the whole family.

cinema.title: Cinema

entertainment.title: Entertainment Zone
entertainment.desc: Bowling, video games, virtual reality, escape rooms — entertainment for all ages.

kids.desc: Secure play area, creative workshops, weekend activities. Ages 2 to 12.

gallery.title: Art Gallery
gallery.desc: Temporary and permanent exhibitions. Contemporary African and international art.

expo.title: Expo Zone
expo.desc: 800 sqm modular space for exhibitions, fairs and cultural events.

hero.overline: Stay at the heart of the experience
hero.title: Hotels
hero.subtitle: Two international hotel brands integrated into Cosmos Angre for an exceptional stay.

brands.title: Two experiences, one exceptional destination
brands.subtitle: Cosmos Angre welcomes two leading Accor hotel brands, for short or extended stays.

ibisStyles.name: Ibis Styles
ibisStyles.subtitle: Comfort and modernity
ibisStyles.description: The Ibis Styles hotel at Cosmos Angre combines colourful design and conviviality. Ideal for business travellers and families, it offers direct access to the shopping centre with breakfast and Wi-Fi included.
features: Direct access to the shopping centre

adagio.name: Adagio Aparthotel
adagio.subtitle: Freedom and autonomy
adagio.description: Adagio Aparthotel offers fully equipped apartments for extended stays. With integrated kitchen, 24/7 reception and a prime location in the heart of Cosmos Angre.
features: Prime location in the heart of Cosmos Angre

packages.title: Stay + Cosmos Experience
packages.description: Combine your stay with shopping, dining and spa for a complete experience.

hero.subtitle: Dedicated Big Box spaces for entertainment, health, cinema and offices.

intro.title: Large-scale spaces
intro.description: Cosmos Angre offers four Big Box spaces designed to host high-value activities: entertainment, cinema, healthcare and professional offices.

entertainment.name: Gaming / Entertainment
entertainment.subtitle: Entertainment and thrills
entertainment.description: A modern entertainment space offering video games, simulators, arcade and interactive activities for all ages.

cinema.name: Cinema
cinema.subtitle: A modern cinema for unforgettable emotions
cinema.description: A state-of-the-art cinema in the heart of Cosmos Angre, equipped with the best audiovisual technology.
features: Cutting-edge technology: exceptional image and sound quality
Varied programming: blockbusters, local films, premieres
Optimal comfort: ergonomic seating and welcoming atmosphere

clinic.name: Clinic
clinic.subtitle: Healthcare at the heart of Cosmos Angre
clinic.description: A modern clinic offering quality medical services in a practical and accessible setting within the center.
features: Various specialties: general medicine, pediatrics, gynecology, cardiology
Fast and smooth service, flexible hours

officePark.subtitle: A modern and functional office space

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What are the center's opening hours?
faq.a1: Monday to Saturday 9am to 9pm, Sunday 10am to 8pm.
faq.a2: Yes, parking is completely free for all visitors.
faq.a3: Yes, our concierge is located at the main entrance and offers guidance, luggage storage and assistance.
faq.q4: Is the center accessible for disabled visitors?
faq.a4: Yes, all buildings are accessible — elevators, ramps and dedicated parking spaces.

templates.legalNoticePlaceholder: You are receiving this email because...

mockCampaigns.springSaleContent: Discover our exceptional offers for the spring sales! Over 200 stores are participating with discounts up to -70% on a wide selection of items. Fashion, electronics, home decor... it's all here! From March 15 to 31, 2025.
mockCampaigns.autumnCollectionContent: Top brands unveil their autumn/winter collections! Discover the latest fashion trends, new styles, and must-have pieces of the season. Visit our partner stores: Zara, H&M, Nike, Adidas and many more.
mockCampaigns.fashionWeekContent: Cosmos Angre hosts Abidjan Fashion Week! Attend an exceptional fashion show on November 10 from 6pm to 10pm. Discover creations from local and international designers. Free admission upon registration.
mockCampaigns.newRestaurantsContent: We are delighted to announce the opening of 5 new restaurants at La Halle Gourmande! Ivorian, Italian, Asian, Lebanese and American cuisine. Come discover these new flavors and enjoy -20% for the opening.
mockCampaigns.kidsDayContent: On Saturday October 5, Cosmos Angre is organizing a special day for children! Creative workshops, shows, games, face painting and much more. All activities are free. From 10am to 6pm.
mockCampaigns.electronicsPromoContent: Your favorite electronics stores offer exceptional discounts! Smartphones, computers, accessories... Enjoy discounts up to -40% throughout October.
mockCampaigns.blackFridayContent: Don't miss our exceptional Black Friday event! On November 29 from 6am to 11pm, enjoy hourly flash deals in all our stores. Prepare your list and be ready!
mockCampaigns.decemberNewsletterContent: Prepare for the holiday season with our partner stores! Gift ideas, decorations, evening outfits... Find all our tips and deals for a successful celebration. Plus exclusive offers for our subscribers.
mockCampaigns.winterSaleContent: Now or never! Final markdown on winter sales with discounts up to -80%. Limited stock, don't delay!
mockCampaigns.loyaltyProgramContent: Discover our new loyalty program! Earn points with every purchase and enjoy exclusive benefits: discounts, priority access to private sales, birthday gifts and much more.

mockTemplates.storePromotionSubject: [Store Name] - Exclusive Offers Not to Miss!
mockTemplates.storePromotionContent:
Hello [First Name],

We are delighted to present our exceptional current offers! Enjoy discounts up to [Percentage]% on [Product Category].

Valid until [Date].

See you soon at Cosmos Angre shopping center!
mockTemplates.eventAnnouncementContent:
Dear subscribers,

We are pleased to invite you to our next event: [Event Name].

Date: [Date]
Time: [Time]
Location: [Location]

Join us! [Free/Paid] admission.

Best regards,
The Cosmos Angre Team
mockTemplates.monthlyNewsletterContent:
Hello,

Discover all the shopping center news this month:

- New stores
- Upcoming events
- Monthly promotions
- Shopping tips

Enjoy your read!
mockTemplates.welcomeNewSubscriberContent:
Hello [First Name],

Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter! You will now receive all our news, exclusive offers and event invitations.

As a welcome gift, enjoy -10% at our partner stores with code: WELCOME10

See you very soon!
mockTemplates.salesMarkdownsContent:
This is the moment you've been waiting for!

The [Season] sales have started with exceptional discounts:

Up to -[Percentage]% in all our stores
Daily flash sales
Gifts for any purchase over [Amount] FCFA

Don't delay, stock is limited!
mockTemplates.eventReminderContent:
Hello,

Just a reminder: our event [Name] takes place TOMORROW!

Meet at [Time] at [Location].

Don't forget to confirm your attendance.

See you tomorrow!
